title: Best-so-far hypothesis (r004 params) + desat palette
hypothesis: Combination experiment. r004 (FORM_MERGE=2 + BODY_CAST=0.3) is the leading candidate from the form-axis search; r009's PALETTE='desat' is a leading candidate from the color-axis search. This run combines them — testing whether form-discipline and color-discipline compose, or whether one undermines the other (e.g. when the palette desaturates, the soft-cast forms might lose silhouette read because they no longer have hue contrast to differentiate panels). If r011 looks better than both r004 and r009, the answer is 'compose'; if it looks like one of them, the dominant lever is whichever it matches.
